final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce announcement poster for UGREEN NAS (绿联私有云) brand 618 Anniversary Sale, intended for Tmall/JD e-commerce platform promotion.

Style/medium: clean commercial poster design with the confident clarity of contemporary Chinese tech branding, designed for high-conversion e-commerce display
Composition: centered hero layout with brand name and offer at visual anchor point, generous negative space for breathing, clear CTA zone at bottom third
Subject: 绿联私有云 (UGREEN NAS) product hero image or product family lineup, 618周年庆 promotional messaging
Scene/backdrop: minimal gradient or abstract tech-infused background suggesting cloud/data flow without cluttering
Lighting/mood: crisp professional product lighting with subtle depth, the trustworthy glow of a mature tech brand
Color palette: UGREEN brand green as primary anchor, balanced with neutral white space and subtle accent tones for sale urgency
Materials/textures: smooth product surfaces with subtle metallic sheen, clean digital typography
Text (verbatim): 绿联私有云, 618周年庆
Constraints: brand logo clearly visible, promotional messaging legible at thumbnail size, e-commerce platform compliant aspect ratio
Avoid: excessive decorative elements, cluttered information hierarchy, generic stock-photo tech aesthetic, over-saturated sale colors
